enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Enadhuyire?

The song Enadhuyire expresses deep feelings of love and longing, beautifully conveyed through its lyrics.

What is the context of this song in the movie Bheema?

In Bheema, this song plays during a romantic sequence, highlighting the emotional connection between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Enadhuyire?

The song features the talented voices of Chinmayi, Nikhil Mathew, Sadhana Sargam, and Sowmya Raoh.

Who wrote the lyrics for Enadhuyire?

The lyrics for Enadhuyire were penned by the lyricist Yugabharathi.

When was Enadhuyire released?

The song was released on January 14, 2008.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Enadhuyire from the movie Bheema is a romantic duet that beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and yearning. The song's soothing melody, combined with heartfelt lyrics, creates an atmosphere of intimacy and connection. As the characters express their feelings, listeners are drawn into a world of romance and nostalgia. This enchanting track is perfect for special occasions like anniversaries and weddings, making it a timeless addition to any romantic playlist.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting vibes of Enadhuyire from the movie Bheema, a beautiful collaboration featuring the mesmerizing voices of Chinmayi, Nikhil Mathew, Sadhana Sargam, and Sowmya Raoh. This romantic melody captures the essence of love and longing, making it a perfect addition to your playlist. Let the soothing tunes and heartfelt lyrics take you on a journey of emotions that resonate deeply with every listener.
stanzaMeanings: My life, my life, you are the one who has come to me, like a god you have been born.
I am like a song that plays in the long shadows, living in this time.
The coming seasons will bring flowers, love will bloom like a fragrance.
My life, my life, you are the one who has come to me, like a god you have been born.
Now there is no night, I see the east direction in your eyes.
Now there is no separation, my love, your presence is my music.
In the sight of seeing you, my life is like a white paper, and you have cried on it, a beautiful painting.
In a small glance, a word emerges, a hundred stars in the sky.
My life, my life, you are the one who has come to me, like a god you have been born.
If I were a tree, I would lose myself in its shadow.
If the leaves fall, oh, my heart will start to beat.
From now on, our hearts will unite and listen to the sound of laughter.
The long moon will shine, and the moonlight will touch the hands of the sky.
You have become a form, you are my salvation in life.
My life, my life, you are the one who has come to me, like a god you have been born.
I am like a song that plays in the long shadows, living in this time.
The coming seasons will bring flowers, love will bloom like a fragrance.
